trades.reasoning: Highest score (95) on the screener with RSI in the ideal 55–70 bullish momentum zone, rising MACD histogram, and price well above SMA-20 — every signal is aligned.
Score 90 with RSI 67.1 in bullish zone and confirmed MACD crossover; low per-share price ($33.56) allows flexible sizing and adds AI-server hardware exposure to the portfolio.

decisions.briefing: Markets were essentially flat today — S&P 500 down 0.3%, NASDAQ unchanged — a neutral session that doesn't justify sitting on cash. With 5 open slots and $1,400 available, I deployed into the two cleanest technical setups: HAE (top screener score, all signals green) and SMCI (strong MACD momentum, semiconductor tailwinds). The portfolio grows to 7 positions, still within risk limits.

market_education.summary_en: Markets drifted marginally lower Thursday with the S&P 500 slipping 0.3% while the NASDAQ held flat, reflecting a low-conviction, wait-and-see session. Investors appear to be pausing ahead of upcoming macroeconomic data and awaiting clearer signals on Federal Reserve rate policy and ongoing trade negotiation developments. Without a definitive catalyst in either direction, the market settled into a tight consolidation range typical of neutral-tone trading days.
market_education.summary_zh: 週四美股小幅收跌，標普500指數微跌0.3%，那斯達克指數幾近持平，整體呈低成交量的觀望格局。市場參與者靜候即將公布的總體經濟數據，並密切關注聯儲局利率政策走向及貿易談判進展，在缺乏明確方向催化劑的情況下，資金入市意願保守。整體而言，市場窄幅整理，短線波動料維持溫和。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that are already trending upward, based on the idea that price trends tend to persist in the short term. Indicators like RSI (measures buying pressure on a 0–100 scale) and MACD (tracks the gap between two moving averages) help confirm when a stock has genuine upside momentum rather than a random spike. Today's picks HAE and SMCI both sit in the 'sweet spot' RSI range of 55–70 — strong enough to show real buyers, but not yet overbought.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入已呈上升趨勢的股票，邏輯在於短線價格趨勢往往具有慣性，強者恆強。RSI（相對強弱指標，範圍0至100）衡量買盤壓力，MACD則追蹤兩條移動平均線的差距，兩者結合可確認股票是否具備真實上漲動能而非曇花一現。今日選入的HAE和SMCI，RSI均落在55至70的「甜蜜區間」——買盤力道強勁，但尚未進入超買區域，風險報酬比相對理想。
